caption: A video recording shows a legislative session of the "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" on "April 12, 2019," focusing on "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage." The setting is a formal room with wood paneling and red seating. Several individuals are present, including men in dark suits and ties and women in professional attire. In the foreground, two men in suits sit side-by-side; one rests his chin on his hand, while the other looks toward him. In the background, other attendees move or sit, including a woman in a white cardigan and a man in a suit. An orange object sits on a desk alongside some papers. An "ORCA" logo is visible on the left of the on-screen text. As the scene progresses, people shift positions; a man in a suit moves across the frame, and a woman in a red top becomes visible in the background.
